entries.title: Add 11L WD submissions: Non-Val SOTA record (1.1472 BPB) + Val-Only aside (0.9274 BPB)
entries.summary: 11-layer GQA GPT uses tuned Muon weight decay and int6+fp16 quantization with sliding-window eval to fit under 16MB for the 10min track.

entries.title: Add Nuclear Stack submission: 1.16668 BPB (seed 2884431328)
entries.summary: Combines Int6 quantized 9-layer GQA + 3×MLP, SmearGate, BigramHash, Muon+SWA training with test-time SGD adaptation and honest stride-32 eval.

entries.title: Add submission: 10L Slide64 Mid6, val_bpb=1.1732
entries.summary: 10-layer sliding-window run keeps fp16 tied-embed passthrough and Muon crossover schedule while reducing tied-embedding LR and forcing mid blocks to int6 for tighter quant artifacts.

entries.title: Record: TTT LoRA + SOTA Training (10L MuonWD FP16Emb OvertoneInit)
entries.summary: Stacks document-isolated LoRA test-time adaptation onto the 10L Muon WD + FP16 embed SOTA recipe, running chunked eval after standard sliding-window quantized scoring.

entries.title: Add ContextFuse-2048-BigramSmear submission
entries.summary: Adds BigramHash/SmearGate int6 compression stack atop ContextFuse-2048 with Muon WD/SWA and corrected sliding-window scoring.

entries.title: Record submission : Int6 + MLP 3x + Flash Attention 3 + NorMuon, val_bpb = 1.1532
entries.summary: Int6-quantized 9-layer model triples MLP dim while using NorMuon and FlashAttention3 to streamline training/runtime with sliding-window evaluation.

entries.title: Add 3xMLP + Mixed Quant + Blockade/Sigma submission (val_bpb: 1.1812)
entries.summary: 3x MLP expansion with blockade/diverse attention and uncertainty-gated residuals, combined with mixed INT8/INT6 quantization to stay under 16MB.

entries.title: Record: Int6 QAT + SmearGate + Muon WD (val_bpb=1.1669)
entries.summary: Int6 QAT with fp16 embedding passthrough, zstd22-friendly int6-in-int8 storage, SmearGate bigram gate, and Muon WD to keep 9L/512d model tiny yet robust.

entries.title: Sliding Window Eval + Muon6 (val_bpb 1.1973)
entries.summary: Combines sliding-window stride-256 eval with a 6-step Muon optimizer and tuned warmup/warmdown to stabilize training before the 10min eval cap.

entries.title: SOTA Attempt: Paid prefix (val_bpb=1.0238)
entries.summary: Store 12.9M val targets in an 8.75MB paid prefix blob and train a 7-layer 384d transformer on fineweb train data to cover the rest.

entries.title: Depth Recurrence via Layer Sharing (3 shared blocks → 1/3 params, matched BPB)
entries.summary: Cycle three distinct transformer blocks over nine virtual layers to match depth with 1/3 unique params, enabling extra recurrence and smaller artifacts.

entries.title: Record: Long Context + All Optimizations submission
entries.summary: Combines long-context training (2048) with conservative Muon/LR scheduling plus sliding-window eval and FP16 tied embeddings.

entries.title: Submission: OrthoInit + Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash (val_bpb: 1.1524)
entries.summary: Orthogonal muP init, Muon tuning, Int6-mixed MLP expansion with SmearGate+BigramHash and FlashAttention 3 for 2048-token sliding eval.

entries.title: SwiGLU dim=576 + Sliding Window + Muon WD (1.2091 BPB)
entries.summary: Auto-searched wider 7-layer SwiGLU with Muon weight decay, FP16 embedding pass-through, and sliding-window eval to shrink artifacts under 16MB.

entries.title: Record: Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash + MuonWD + SWA (mean val_bpb=1.1483)
entries.summary: Per-row int6 quantization enables a 3× widened MLP with SmearGate+BigramHash context while muon WD/SWA stabilize weights.

entries.title: Record:Add TTT-LoRA 512d submission (val_bpb=1.1957)
entries.summary: 512d transformer with LoRA test-time tuning rescues int8 quantization within the 10-minute/16MB budget

entries.title: Record: MLP3x + Int8 Tok Emb + Grouped LZMA + Sliding Window (val_bpb=1.1623)
entries.summary: 9L GQA transformer with 3x MLP trained at seq_len=2048, quantized to int6 (asset int8 token emb) and exported via grouped QGv3+LZMA for sliding-window eval.

entries.title: feat(record): Int6 STE + NorMuon + SWA + Sliding Window (val_bpb=1.16019)
entries.summary: Int6 STE quant + NorMuon optimizer + SWA lets a wider MLP with U-Net skips stay within 16MB, aided by sliding-window eval and zstd compression.

entries.title: Record: sliding eval, FP16 tied embeddings, 10 layers, Muon WD 0.02, overtone init, and phase-transition residual mixing. (val_bpb 1.1876)
entries.summary: 10-layer Muon WD model using FP16 tied embeddings, overtone spectral init, residual-mix start, and sliding-window final evaluation.

entries.title: Non-record: Cross-layer parameter sharing + 4-bit QAT (RecurrentGPT)
entries.summary: Prelude-recurrent-coda depth recurrence with per-iteration gating plus 4-bit quantization-aware training tightens 16MB artifacts in RecurrentGPT.

entries.title: Add TTT (Test-Time Training) submission: 1.1767 BPB
entries.summary: Full-model SGD adapts to validation data during eval, reclaiming the unused 10-min budget before sliding-window scoring.

entries.title: Non-record: FP16 embed + WD20k + seq2048 + doc-isolated sliding window (val_bpb=1.2045)
entries.summary: Combines FP16 tied embed export, aggressive warmdown tuning, seq2048 training, and doc-isolated sliding-window evaluation on the 9L baseline.

entries.title: [WIP] Record: Int6 QAT + BigramHash + MLP 1344 (val_bpb 1.1593)
entries.summary: STE int6 QAT model adds a 4096-bucket BigramHash embedding with oversized MLP and Muon momentum, using sliding-window eval for dense context.

entries.title: Add Combined Int6 + QAT + Sliding Window submission
entries.summary: Combines Int6 quant with late-K passthrough, late-stage QAT, and sliding-window eval plus cosine warmdown and Muon/AdamW tweaks for robust compression.

entries.title: Depth Recurrence + Cross-Repeat Skip + Sliding Window Eval
entries.summary: Shared 3-block depth recurrence with cross-repeat skips, value embeddings, and sliding-window eval boosts effective depth efficiently.

entries.title: Record/smaller batch sota, val_bpb 1.16314679 (post-quant, int6+zlib, sliding eval)
entries.summary: SOTA stack trims TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS to boost optimizer steps while relying on sliding eval plus tighter int8 clipping and float32 per-row scales for quant-friendly int6 export.

entries.title: Non-record: Warmdown-Tuned Training (val_bpb=1.2987) on 1xRTX 5090
entries.summary: Warmdown-tuning a 9-layer GPT (3000 warmdown iters) shows cosine LR warmdown produces 2.6× efficiency gains while probing register tokens and layer looping.

entries.title: Non-record: QAT ablation — int8 QAT overhead exceeds quantization gap recovery
entries.summary: Quant-match int8 QAT on the 9L×512 baseline uses torch.quantile fake quantization to mimic export, showing its overhead exceeds the modest gap recovery.

entries.title: Add MPK 8x384 10-minute submission record
entries.summary: MPK multi-path causal LM with 8 layers/384 width, KV4 GQA, MPK strides k=2 m=4, tied embeddings, tuned low LRs, and a fixed SentencePiece marker for valid scoring.

entries.title: Add ContextFuse-2048 submission
entries.summary: Combines 2048-token training, sliding-window evaluation, fp16 tied embeddings, and Muon-tuned LR width tweaks for a byte-safe baseline submission.

entries.title: Non-record: Systematic Hyperparameter Search (val_bpb=1.2075)
entries.summary: Systematically tuned Muon optimizer, ROPE_BASE and 4k context length via tiered paired comparisons before final 8×H100 validation.

entries.title: Non-record: BitNet b1.58 — 65M ternary params beat 4-hour baseline in 10 minutes (val_bpb=1.2029)
entries.summary: BitNet b1.58 trains a 64.5M-parameter ternary transformer with STE BitLinear layers and base-3 packing to squeeze maximal Chinchilla-scaled capacity into 15MB.

entries.title: Record: Int6 + MLP 3x + STE QAT + NorMuon + sliding window (val_bpb 1.1666)
entries.summary: Combines STE fake-int6 QAT, NorMuon+SWA, and 3x-expanded MLP under mixed quantization with sliding-window evaluation.

entries.title: Record: Seq2048 training + eval (val_bpb=1.2101)
entries.summary: Training and evaluation both run with 2048-token context to learn long-range dependencies without changing the baseline architecture.

entries.title: Record: OrthoInit + Int6 MLP3x + BigramHash + SmearGate (val_bpb: 1.1539)
entries.summary: muP-scaled orthogonal init plus zstd-compressed int6 lets GPT-9 grow a 3x MLP, add SmearGate/bigram hash, and use tuned Muon optimizer.

entries.title: [WIP] add combined optimization, waiting for 8 gpu train
entries.summary: Combines SwiGLU blocks, int6 quant/Aware-training, cosine LR, and adaptive batch/stride logic with sliding-window eval for the 10min/16MB track.

entries.title: Non-record: Muon-Aware QAT + LAWA + Adaptive LR Scheduling (7 toggleable improvements)
entries.summary: Combines Muon-aware late-start QAT with LAWA smoothing, adaptive LR scheduling, and compression tweaks tailored to Muon’s quant sensitivity.

entries.title: Record: Int6 MLP3x + STE QAT + Sliding Window (val_bpb=1.1594)
entries.summary: Int6 per-row quantization with STE QAT frees budget for a 3× wider MLP while sliding-window scoring keeps nearly full context.

entries.title: Non-record: Depth recurrence + widening + QAT + sliding window eval
entries.summary: Depth-recurrent 3-block transformer with widened heads and per-loop LoRA, ALBERT-style embeddings, and STE-driven int6 QAT with sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Non-record: BitNet b1.58 + depth recurrence + NorMuon (1.7510 BPB, 3.78 MB)
entries.summary: Ternary-packed BitNet b1.58 uses depth recurrence with U-Net skips, NorMuon optimizer, and YaRN warmup to fit a larger model in 3.78MB.

entries.title: Add non-record 16MB layers7 submission
entries.summary: A non-record 16MB run uses a 7-layer, 512-dim GPT variant on train_gpt.py to trade depth for throughput under the 600s cap.

entries.title: Record: Vocab 4096 + MLP 3x + Sliding Window Eval (mean val_bpb=1.1642, 3 seeds)
entries.summary: Int6 quant enables a 4096-vocab, 3×MLP GPT trained on 4096-context with SWA, followed by sliding-window eval for richer scoring.

entries.title: Record: Sliding Window Eval, 2048 Vocab Size, fp16 embeddings, SWA, NorMuon, FA3; val_bpb:1.1585
entries.summary: NorMuon + FlashAttention 3 run with quant-awareness, int6 weights/FP16 embeddings, 2048 vocab, 3× MLP, SWA, and sliding-window eval.

entries.title: [Val Only]: MLP 3x + STE int6 QAT + sliding window, val_bpb=0.9588
entries.summary: Val-only 9-layer transformer widens MLP to 3x and trains with STE int6 QAT, mixed int6/int8 quantization, Muon tweaks, and sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Add Psionic non-record runtime replay submission
entries.summary: Psionic's non-record bundle ships a prebuilt runtime plus train_gpt.py to restore its int8+zlib artifact and rerun the bounded local-reference eval.

entries.title: Non-record: 1x RTX 4090 compat smoke (50 steps)
entries.summary: Baseline 9×512 SP-1024 on a single RTX 4090 with manual KV-head expansion so SDPA runs without enable_gqa for a reproducible CUDA compatibility smoke test.

entries.title: Record: Int6 + MLP 3x + STE QAT + NorMuon + sliding window (val_bpb 1.1666)
entries.summary: Combines STE fake-int6 QAT, 3x MLP expansion, NorMuon updates, and SWA-warmed sliding-window eval to make mixed int6 quantization practical.

entries.title: #1 on leaderboard: val_bpb=1.1574 — Int6 + MLP 3x + selective precision + optimized long-context training
entries.summary: Int6 post-training quantization with fp16 selective precision and a tripled MLP width powers 2048-window training and stride-256 sliding-window eval within 16MB.

entries.title: Record: FP16 Embed + Sliding Window Eval + Warmdown Tuning (pending eval)
entries.summary: Quantizes with FP16 tied embeddings, stride-64 sliding-window eval, and a tuned warmdown/LR schedule for better convergence under the 10-min cap.

entries.title: Depth Recurrence 5x3 d672 SwiGLU
entries.summary: Reuses five transformer blocks three times to get 15 effective layers at width 672 with SwiGLU, tuning warmdown/momentum and eval seqlen 2048.

entries.title: Non-record unlimited-compute: 1-hour 1xH100 warmdown 9x512
entries.summary: Extended 1xH100 9x512 run with WARMDOWN_ITERS=100 to push longer single-GPU scaling while staying under the 16MB artifact cap.

entries.title: Submission: Top-Heavy FFN Allocation + Packed Int6 Export | pending eval
entries.summary: Top-heavy FFN allocation shifts capacity to deeper blocks while keeping the 9x512 backbone, paired with packed int6 export and sliding-window eval readiness.

entries.title: [Non-record] Depth-Recurrent 3×3 MLX — dev submission (Apple Silicon)
entries.summary: Depth-recurrent GPT with 3 unique blocks iterated thrice plus AdaLN conditioning and GQA, trained on MLX Apple M3 Max.

entries.title: Int6+zstd MLP1488 + Sliding Window + QAT + Tuned LR (val_bpb=1.1648)
entries.summary: Int6 mixed quantization + zstd compression on key weights, wider MLP, sliding-window eval, and short post-training QAT with tuned Muon LRs.

entries.title: record: 1.158
entries.summary: Reuses PR88's quantization-aware training tricks and export flow to meet the 16MB golf constraint.

entries.title: Non-record: Stacked hyperparameter tuning + eval2048 (RTX 5090, val_bpb 1.336)
entries.summary: Autoresearch loop stacks WARMDOWN_ITERS, LR, softcap, momentum, and batch-token tweaks before eval2048 on the 9x512 baseline.

entries.title: Non-record: Looped Transformer + LoRA + Skip Connections + NorMuon + SWA + Int6 + Sliding Window
entries.summary: Looped 5-block transformer uses per-virtual-layer LoRA and skip connections to span 30 virtual layers while training with NorMuon and Int6 quantization plus sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Int6 MLP3x + Tuned LR + SmearGate + SlidingWindow (val_bpb: 1.1618)
entries.summary: Per-row int6 quant + zstd frees space for a 3× MLP GPT that blends bigrams via SmearGate before attention and uses sliding-window eval.

entries.title: submission: Int6 MLP3x + Late-K Passthrough + SlidingWindow (val_bpb: 1.1605)
entries.summary: Int6-quantized 9-layer GPT3x MLP with fp16 late-layer K plus grouped int8 elsewhere, paired with stride-64 sliding-window evaluation.

entries.title: Sliding Window + Long-Context Training: val_bpb=1.1764
entries.summary: Train 2048 tokens with high Muon momentum, tight clipping, and stride-512 sliding-window eval to capture long context with more steps.

entries.title: PROTEUS EMA — val_bpb: 1.2253
entries.summary: Baseline GPT uses EMA smoothing, FP16 embeddings, seq-2048 training, and sliding-window eval to shrink INT8 quantization loss before final scoring.

entries.title: Non-record: Warmdown fix (9x512) on 1xH100 10m
entries.summary: Same 9x512 baseline swaps to a 100-iter warmdown so 1xH100 steps keep a higher LR without changing architecture or data.

entries.title: Non-record: Compact 12x384 1xH100 10m
entries.summary: Tests a 12-layer, 384-dim GQA Transformer with tied embeddings to shrink the int8+zlib artifact under 16MB in a 1xH100 10m run.

entries.title: Record: 8192 Vocab, Sliding Window Eval, Selective Quantization; 1.194 val_bpb
entries.summary: 8-layer model uses SP-8192 tokenizer, NorMuon, stride-256 sliding window eval, and selective w6e8 quantization for compact, accurate scoring.

entries.title: [codex] add gw kv2 int7 non-record submission
entries.summary: Dense 9-layer KV2 branch trades KV heads for a 1248-width MLP, lowers quantizer passthrough thresholds, and applies int7 mid-layer coarsening with a reduced LR schedule.

entries.title: record:  val_bpb=1.1622, NorMuon + int6 STE + SWA + sliding window
entries.summary: Combines int6 STE quant with fp16 embed passthrough, NorMuon optimizer plus SWA warmdown, and sliding-window eval stride=64.

entries.title: Record: Int6 MLP3x + MTP + Sliding Window Eval (val_bpb=1.1605)
entries.summary: Int6+zstd quantization frees artifact budget for a 3× expanded MLP trained at seq4096 with fp16 tied embeddings and sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Update:  MLP 3x + QAT + Int6 + Sliding Window (val_bpb 1.1652)
entries.summary: Wider MLP (3× hidden) with int6 QAT weights, fp16 tied embeddings, and sliding-window stride-64 eval for the compressed 10m/16MB track.

entries.title: Record (pending): 92-experiment autoresearch + sliding window eval, pre-quant val_bpb=1.2156
entries.summary: Autoresearch-tuned 9L/512d model uses sliding-window RoPE eval and relu²+RMSNorm with Muon/AdamW to keep int8 quantization clean on 8xH100.

entries.title: Add mirrored-recurrence MLX non-record submission
entries.summary: Mirrored recurrence reuses nine transformer blocks to double logical depth, running encoder forward and decoder backward without growing parameter count.

entries.title: Record: SwiGLU + MLP 3x + Int6 + LoRA TTT, val_bpb=1.1670 (8xH100)
entries.summary: Stacks 3x MLP expansion, SwiGLU, int6 quantization with QAT, and LoRA test-time training per validation document.

entries.title: Add Aria local sweep tooling and non-record 16MB runs
entries.summary: Adds local fast-sweep tooling plus rule-compliant full-val non-record submissions using 8x576 KV4 models with tuned RoPE bases and int8+zlib serialization.

entries.title: Depth Recurrence: 3x3x1024 (non-record, pending H100)
entries.summary: Reuses three unique transformer blocks via depth recurrence (3 repeats) and scales dim to fit 16MB with Int6 QAT plus NorMuon tuning.

entries.title: Record: 8192 Vocab Size, NorMuon, Selective Quantization; 1.186 val_bpb
entries.summary: Uses an 8192-token sp BPE tokenizer plus NorMuon blocks with selective int6 weight/int8 embedding quantization to retool the baseline architecture.

entries.title: [record bpb=1.195] sliding window + LoRA TTT
entries.summary: Baseline training with document-isolated sliding-window eval adds per-document LoRA TTT (rank-8 on lm_head/q/v) to adapt each chunk.

entries.title: [WIP] Int6 + Wider MLP 3x + FP16 Embed + Sliding Window (est. val_bpb ~1.160)
entries.summary: Combines int6 per-row quantization with wider MLP, fp16 tied embeddings, and sliding-window eval to shrink artifacts while boosting eval fidelity.

entries.title: Add seq4096 sliding-window fp16 tok coarsen record
entries.summary: Seq4096 sliding-window with tuned Muon, fp16 tok emb retention, selective block coarsening, and stride-64 scoring.

entries.title: Add seq4096 fp16 tok coarsen record
entries.summary: Train 9x512 GQA at seq_len 4096 with a Muon-tuned schedule, exporting by keeping tok_emb fp16 and coarsening only block 5 to stay under the 16MB cap.

entries.title: Non-record: SwiGLU + warmdown fix + quarter batch (1x5090, 1.3281 bpb)
entries.summary: SwiGLU with a time-fraction warmdown and quarter-batch plus gradient accumulation pack more optimizer steps under the 16MB cap on 1×RTX5090.

entries.title: Add Parameter Golf submission: Depth12 Dim416 KV4
entries.summary: Deeper/narrower SP-1024 layout with KV4 heads and tied embeddings on 8×H100 within a 10-minute cap for the 16MB track.

entries.title: Submission: Wider MLP 3x + int6 quant + sliding window eval, val_bpb=1.1659
entries.summary: Wider 3x MLP with int6 per-row quantization on projections plus sliding-window eval keeps more context while staying under the artifact cap.

entries.title: SubSixteen v2: Int6 QAT + MLP 3x + SWA + Sliding Window (val_bpb 1.1708)
entries.summary: Int6 QAT on a 9-layer GPT with 3x MLP, Muon/AdamW mix, SWA warmdown, sliding-window eval, and zstd-22 export to squeeze under 16MB.

entries.title: ArjunAutoResearch: MLP 3x + STE int6 QAT + seq4096 + sliding window. val_bpb 1.1632
entries.summary: AutoResearch agent stacks widened MLP, seq4096, STE int6 QAT, int6 storage, and sliding-window eval within the 16MB budget.

entries.title: Record: Mixed Quant Int6/FP16 + SmearGate + OrthoInit + MLP 3x + Sliding Window, val_bpb=1.1556
entries.summary: Combines SmearGate bigram gating, orthogonal init, Muon’s orthogonalized weight decay, and int6 STE quantization with a 3× MLP plus sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Record: val_bpb=0.9695 (val-only) + val_bpb=1.1629 (standard)
entries.summary: MLP-3x with STE int6 QAT, mixed quantization, tuned Muon and sliding-window eval, plus a val-only variant using the same architecture.

entries.title: Record: 10L Int6 QAT + Zstd MLP2.6x Muon0.99 Sliding Window (val_bpb 1.1598)
entries.summary: Stacks 10-layer baseline with STE int6 QAT plus zstd-compressed quantization, wider MLP, Muon momentum tuning, and sliding-window eval.

entries.title: WIP: Add adaptive eval-time context non-record MLX submission
entries.summary: Adds MLX adaptive eval-time context with a coarse-to-fine rescore pass on hard windows, trading more eval time for improved roundtrip coverage over fixed strides.

entries.title: Record: Sliding Window + FP16 Embed + 10L + Muon WD + Overtone Init (val_bpb=1.1748)
entries.summary: Combines sliding-window scoring, FP16 tied embeddings, Muon with decoupled weight decay, and spectral+residual inits to support a 10-layer config.

entries.title: NTK Eval + Overtone Init (val_bpb=1.2160)
entries.summary: Introduces overtone SVD-based embedding init, sigmoid phase-transition resid mix, and NTK-aware RoPE scaling to extend evaluation context beyond training length.

entries.title: Add Deep14x416 KV2 non-record MLX submission (val_bpb=1.8440)
entries.summary: Documents a deeper/narrower 14×416 SP-1024 KV2 MLX run on Apple Silicon by reusing the repo trainer while trading width for depth and tuning eval batch/chunking.

entries.title: Add RecursoLM v0 non-record submission scaffold
entries.summary: Recurrent parameter-tied transformer uses ALiBi multi-query attention and SwiGLU with a learned gate to trade stored parameters for iterative depth.

entries.title: RQZ-Golf v1: Depth recurrence for parameter efficiency
entries.summary: Shares a recurrent block across passes with iteration embeddings and scaled residuals to extend depth per parameter and boost inference K.

entries.title: 1.1888 BPB via SP-4096 compression + stride-64 sliding window
entries.summary: Combines SP-4096 tokenizer compression with stride-64 sliding-window evaluation on an 8-layer GQA encoder-decoder trained via Muon optimizer.

entries.title: New SOTA attempt (val_bpb=1.2014)
entries.summary: Long-context (train seq 4096) 9×512 KV4 run with aggressive Muon tuning (0.99 momentum, low LR, warmdown) to sharpen quantized quality.

entries.title: [WIP] Depth-recurrent QAT: 3x4 loops, 768d, 15.6MB artifact
entries.summary: Shared 3-block transformer loops depth-recurrence with per-loop LoRA and QAT to widen to 768 dims while supporting int8 export.

entries.title: [Submission] Warmdown Scheduling - 1.2430 BPB on 8×H100 SXM
entries.summary: Extended warmdown iterations so cosine LR decay triggers in the final third of 600s runs for better convergence on capped hardware.

entries.title: Modal 8xH100 LowerLR FP16Embed 960 (val_bpb 1.22395)
entries.summary: Modal 8xH100 lowers LR with tied FP16 embeddings and trims MLP hidden to 960 before int8+zlib quant to meet the 16MB cap.

entries.title: val-only 10min record (val_bpb:1.1111)
entries.summary: Baseline ties-embeddings 9x512 model trained solely on the validation shard for the 10-minute, 16MB track to document a val-only regime.

entries.title: Add Modal 8xH100 timed validation non-record submission
entries.summary: 10-minute Modal 8xH100 run reuses the current train_gpt.py snapshot with the published FineWeb sp1024 export and int8+zlib serialization for a timed validation non-record entry.

entries.title: PhiDelay Shared-Recurrent LM (3.23 bpb, 6.84MB)
entries.summary: PhiDelay-inspired shared-recurrent transformer reuses three physical blocks with gated delay mixing across four passes to deliver a compact, 12-layer LM.

entries.title: Record: 10L Mixed Precision: val_bpb=1.2147 (10 layers + int6 middle layers)
entries.summary: 10-layer transformer keeps int8 early/late layers, int6 middle layers, and uses lower Muon/Adam learning rates to fit under 16MB with better compression.

entries.title: [WIP] SP4096: Larger vocabulary for better BPB
entries.summary: 4096-token SentencePiece BPE and untied input/output embeddings shrink tokens-per-byte without touching the base GPT architecture.

entries.title: [Partial submission] naive baseline + dispersion loss
entries.summary: Fixed 9-layer/512-dim GPT uses dispersion loss regularization and published fineweb10B_sp1024 tokenizer, evaluated via int8+zlib roundtrip.

entries.title: Non-record: Depth-recurrent 5x3 d768, val_bpb=1.2663
entries.summary: Five shared transformer blocks looped three times at dim 768 mimic 15 layers, trading width for depth via depth-recurrent reuse on the Non-record track.

entries.title: [WIP] Recurrent MQA Transformer — depth recurrence + weight tying (nidhilak-Aquarius)
entries.summary: Loops a single shared Transformer block 12× with tied embeddings, MQA, RoPE, and SwiGLU to exploit depth recurrence and parameter regularization.

entries.title: Improved baseline: recurrent depth + LoRA + MTP
entries.summary: Weight-shared five-block transformer loops twice with learned recurrence scales, LoRA adapters, and wider 704-dim heads plus SwiGLU MLP.

entries.title: QAT + Architecture Exploration (Non-Record)
entries.summary: Implements STE-driven quantization-aware training with fake int8 per-row quant on all linear layers while keeping evaluation on unquantized weights.

entries.title: Add depth recurrence + SwiGLU submission (Apple M3 8GB)
entries.summary: Depth recurrence reuses 4 unique transformer blocks with per-pass gates plus SwiGLU MLPs to enable a wider 640-dim U-Net variant on constrained Apple M3 hardware.

entries.title: Please delete this PR
entries.summary: Baseline 9×512 transformer trains with late-phase STE-based QAT and grad clipping to recover int8 robustness without architectural tweaks.
